problem: What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants?
mechanism: Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating
hypothesis: If Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating is applied to formation, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 35 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
